MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JUL-10-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-10-2013 IN 206, DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. AFTER FINDING GOOD CAUSE, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/10/14 IS CONTINUED TO 3/10/14 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: RVELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
